programme.title: Wes Montgomery, Pim Jacobs, Ruud Jacobs & Han Bennink
programme.sub-title: Guitarlegend Wes Montgomery in The Netherlands
programme.desc: Wes Montgomery: Live in '65 shines a light on one of the most unique and influential guitarists in music history. These beautifully filmed programs from the spring of 1965 feature Wes, in intimate studio settings, leading three different lineups through some of his best-known tunes, including “Four On Six”, “Jingles”, and “West Coast Blues”. This rare footage, featuring rehearsals, between-song banter, and closeup camera angles, illuminates Wes's extraordinary musical vocabulary and unconventional picking technique.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Modern Jazz Quartet
programme.desc: Formed in 1952 from the rhythm section of Dizzy Gillespie's big band, the Modern Jazz Quartet took its inspiration from classical chamber music as well as jazz's blues roots. The group enjoyed a decades-long career with multiple critically acclaimed albums, cementing their place in the history of the genre. Following concerts in Rotterdam and Amsterdam the days before, the Modern Jazz Quartet performed at Singer Concertzaal in Laren for Dutch TV on March 31, 1969. Composed of Milt Jackson on vibraphone, John Lewis on piano, Percy Heath on bass, and Connie Kay on drums, the foursome plays with elegance and style.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Freddie Hubbard, Al Grey, Alvin Batiste & Al Casey
programme.sub-title: Freddie Hubbard & The Satchmo Legacy Live in 1987
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. This concert of Freddie Hubbard and the Satchmo Legacy in 1987, highlights the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. Hubbard is an American jazz trumpeter whose unmistakable and influential tone contributed to new perspectives for modern jazz and bebop. He was also a well-known part of Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers and is primarily known for playing bebop, hard bop, and post-bop styles from the early '60s onwards.

programme.title: Astrud Gilberto, Marcelo Gilberto, David Sacks & Gil Goldstein
programme.sub-title: Astrud Gilberto Band Live at Estival Lugano 1985
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. “The Girl From Ipanema”, Astrud Gilberto's second name. The Brazilian bossa-nova and samba singer gives an outstanding, swinging performance at Estival Lugano. The band features Marcello Gilberto, David Sacks, Gil Goldstein, and Eduardo da Fonseca. Astrud started to record her own compositions in the '70s. She has recorded songs in Portuguese, English, Spanish, Italian, French, German, and Japanese.

programme.title: Christian Scott
programme.desc: In 2019, the vibrant city of Sofia, Bulgaria, hosted the International A to JazZ Festival. Among the featured acts was the trailblazing jazz trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah. This genre-defying artist captivated the audience with his eclectic “stretch music” an approach that incorporates hip-hop and reaches back through the American canon into African percussion and its rich melodic content. Trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah's quintet, which includes drummer Corey Fonville, percussionist Weedie Braimah, pianist Lawrence Fields, and bass guitarist Max Mucha, delivered a performance that defied boundaries and expectations.

programme.title: Ahmad Jamal Trio
programme.sub-title: Ahmad Jamal Trio - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, legendary jazz pianist Ahmad Jamal brought his trio to the North Sea Jazz Festival. Accompanied by James Cammack on bass and David Bowler on drums, Jamal showcased his excellence.

programme.title: Maria Luigia Borsi & Antonio Artese
programme.sub-title: Vocal works by Puccini, Leoncavallo a. o.
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Maria Luigia Borsi (soprano) and Antonio Artese (piano) present a recital consisting of several songs and arias. On the program are Francesco Paolo Tosti's Sogno, ‘A vucchella, and L'alba separa dalla luce l'ombra Giacomo Puccini's Sole e amore, Sogno d'or, “Donde lieta” (from La Bohème), “Il bel sogno di Doretta” (from La rondine), and “O mio babbino caro” (from Gianni Schicchi) Renato Brogi's Presentimento, Ruggero Leoncavallo's Mattinata, and Alfredo Catalini's Chanson Groenlandaise.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon, Olga Kern & Sol Gabetta
programme.desc: American conductor Leonard Slatkin leads the Orchestre National de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in 2014. The concert opens with William Bolcom´s Circus Ouverture, which was specially composed for Slatkin's 70th birthday. The concert continues with a performance of Beethoven's Triple Concerto in C, Op. 56 performed by three female soloists: Olga Kern (piano), Baibe Skride (violin) and Sol Gabetta (cello). The work is the only concerto which Beethoven ever completed for more than one solo instrument. The concert closes with Ravel's beloved orchestration of Mussorgsky's Pictures at an Exhibition.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Tuva Semmingsen, Klaus Tönshoff, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & DR Big Band
programme.desc: Musicians of the Danish National Symphony Orchestra, the DR Big Band, and the Danish National Vocal Ensemble join forces under the baton of Klaus Tönshoff in this dazzling concert featuring great songs from black and white cinema. Norwegian mezzosoprano Tuva Semmingsen sings ‘Diamonds Are A Girl's Best Friend', from Gentlemen Prefer Blondes, ‘My Favorite Things' from The Sound of Music, ‘Over the Rainbow' from The Wizard of Oz, ‘Moon River' from Breakfast at Tiffany's, and many other unforgettable hits. This concert performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in June 2020.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.title: The Pretenders
programme.desc: The Pretenders, originally three Englishmen and an American woman, emerged at the close of the '70s as one of the new wave's most commercially successful groups. Its focal point was Chrissie Hynde, the band's songwriter, lead singer, and rhythm guitarist, whose tough songs and stage persona put feminist self-assertion into her own distinctive hard rock. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Pretenders.

programme.title: Un romance de verano
programme.desc: El rancho de Samantha en Montana es el legado de su familia, por lo que cuando aparece un empresario para comprarlo, Sam no está interesada. Pero mientras él intenta ganarse la confianza de ella y el rancho, Sam descubre que él también podría estar ganando su corazón. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Navidad en Evergreen
programme.desc: Cuando cierran el aeropuerto por un temporal, una veterinaria se encuentra con un doctor y su hija. El resultado del encuentro les traerá a todos una Navidad mágica que jamás habrían soñado. Protagonizada por Ashley Williams y Teddy Sears.

programme.title: Un dueto navideño
programme.desc: Famoso por su amado dúo navideño, el destino reúne a la ex pareja musical, Averie y Jesse, durante las fiestas navideñas, justo a tiempo para el Festival anual de Navidad. Actúan Chaley Rose, Rome Flynn y Teryl Rothery.

programme.title: Se vende casa con fantasma
programme.desc: Un fantasma de los años 20 se niega a abandonar la nueva casa de la agente inmobiliaria Anna. Peor aun, el espíritu está convencido de que no puede "seguir adelante" hasta que Anna vuelva a estar con su ex. Protagonizada por Julie Gonzalo, Chris McNally y Madeleine Arthur.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn profundiza en los vínculos personales que lo une a un caso cada vez más enigmático. El sargento Manuelito interroga a Chee, aunque se muestra reluctante a hacerlo. El hallazgo de un cadáver provoca que Leaphorn y Manuelito busquen a un niño.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Chee empieza a actuar por su propia cuenta tras el encuentro con un hombre peligroso. Leaphorn y Manuelito establecen una alianza con el sheriff del departamento, lo que le permite a Leaphorn encontrar una pista muy importante.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn pone en peligro su vida durante la persecución de un sospechoso. Manuelito desafía al sheriff con la intención de rescatar a su jefe. Chee reflexiona sobre una propuesta peligrosa que le ofrecerá respuestas sobre el caso.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn trabaja a contrarreloj para obtener una confesión de un sospechoso antes de que deje de estar bajo su custodia. Mientras tanto, Chee se introduce de incógnito en la secta que vincula sus distintas investigaciones.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn y Chee encuentran evidencias que vinculan sus casos, pero traen consigo una amarga verdad: será difícil que se haga justicia. Entretanto, Manuelito se prepara para un gran cambio en su vida.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Eli McCullough sobrevive a un ataque Comanche en 1849, y en 1915, dirige el imperio de su familia a través de tiempos difíciles.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: El joven Eli aprende a vivir entre los Comanches Eli y Pete discrepan sobre cómo responder a un ataque contra su casa.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: El joven Eli entrena como un guerrero, pero hace enemigos Eli y Phineas luchan por ayudar a la familia en Austin Pete se enfrenta a sus demonios.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Varias culturas de la antigüedad por todo el mundo creían que los meteoritos no eran simplemente rocas que caían del cielo, sino piedras sagradas que poseían poderes divinos. ¿Podrían ser estas rocas espaciales partes de una tecnología extraterrestre?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: ¿Será posible que extraterrestres de la pequeña estrella Sirio B hayan visitado a los humanos en el pasado, impartiendo los conocimientos de su civilización a personas separadas por miles de kilómetros? ¿Y habrán dejado una pista dentro de una palabra?

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Harta de los maltratos de Kyle, Isabel corre a los brazos de Nacho y ambos dejan Canadá para ir a Nueva York. No miden las consecuencias de una guerra que va mas allá de la infidelidad.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.sub-title: Nacho en el blanco con Kyle
programme.desc: El rey de Toronto busca a Nacho para matarlo, pero cuando la DEA interviene en una disco de Manhattan, el destino juega en su contra. Está dispuesto a hablar, pero a cambio de algún beneficio.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Luego de un enfrentamiento en el hospital, rodean a Leonor y Ramos, quienes tienen que dejar escapar a Heriberto. Para probar su lealtad al Chema, Ernesto mata a uno de los hombres de Chacorta.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Heriberto y Leonor se enfrentan por última vez. Él descubre la emboscada, pero no puede escapar de su suerte. Moribundo, asegura que ella se ha convertido en lo que tanto combatió, una asesina.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de Heriberto, Aurelio declara la guerra para vengarlo: tiene ganas de matar a medio mundo. Todos se preparan para lo peor. Victoria le pone más protección a Leonor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro besa a Verónica y le confiesa que lo hace para recordar a Gabriela. La señora Dantés se encuentra a David en el cementerio y escucha todo el amor que él profesa por su abuelo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La señora Guerra disfruta de haber separado a su hijastra de Maximiliano. Verónica sabe que Valentina será la próxima víctima. Además, descubre que la abuela de la joven fue envenenada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de indagar la conexión de los Suárez con la mina del Chamuco y Ricardo se le une. La ira de Antonia cae sobre Cecilia. David no la defiende y Francisca la recibe en su casa.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: Lorena destruye las pruebas
programme.desc: Mientras Joel oye por qué el forense se vio obligado a ocultar los documentos que exculpan a Sofía, Lorena los rompe. Ernesto sorprende Alejandra y ella simula estar ofendida.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Isabel amenaza con suicidarse y acepta la supuesta ayuda de Fernanda. Vicente quiere a Fernanda con él y para lograrlo, trata de convencer a Bernardo sobre la necesidad de matar a Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda asesina a Isabel. Juan Marcos y Ángela se enfrentan a tiros con unos hombres, en medio de la situación aprovechan para confesarse su amor.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos se siente responsable por la muerte de Isabel. Willy no soporta pensar que Sam y su padre son amantes. Fernanda está como loca al enterarse de que Vicente trató de matar a Juan Marcos. Ángela dice a Juan Marcos que debe irse de la casa.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos despide a Ángela para protegerla y Estela duda de esa decisión. Emma y Gabriel se besan mientras Pablo los ve. Samantha le reconoce a Willy que Perla es la verdadera amante de su padre.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Las vidas de Samantha y Ángela quedaron marcadas después del secuestro que sufrió Sam cuando era una niña, ahora ambas están dedicadas a proteger a otros. Juan Marcos conoce a Ángela y hay química entre ellos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Luis molesta a Ángela en su trabajo, mientras Fernanda jura que la quitará de su camino. Samantha sigue cuidando a Willy, él está con otra mujer y ella no puede evitar estar celosa.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Luis le dice a Fernanda que no puede matar a Ángela porque es su mujer. La amenaza diciéndole que, si le llega a hacer algo, él sacará a la luz pública la información sobre la muerte de los padres de Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano acompañan a Lupita a la feria de su pueblo, donde la mujer se reencuentra con un pretendiente, quien de inmediato se convierte en un rival de los guapos, resolviendo el conflicto muy a la mexicana.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: HOLMES + HOLMES
programme.desc: The two properties couldn't be more different in style, setting, location -- and in their progress. Things are looking up at the Country House as the walls and trusses go in, which is the polar opposite of what's happening at the River House. The demo is complete, but the live-work-play property has exposed structural issues with the roof and walls. So, while the Country House goes up, the River House progress slows right down.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Charmaine and Zephie discover a third floor in their home that's been sealed off for decades, and are plagued by visions of black mould. They call Mike Holmes and his crew to tackle the project and solve the mystery once and for all.

programme.title: HOLMES + HOLMES
programme.desc: Risks are high at the River House as MJ and the crew push ahead with the roof while Mike waits to hear about permits. ? Back at the Country House the progress has hit a standstill, and Mike worries the house won't be closed by winter. Father and son are at an impasse, as they cannot agree on flooring. Thankfully HGTV Canada Designer and friend of the Holmes, Sarah Richardson drops by for a visit and offers some very good advice.

programme.title: Critical Listing
programme.desc: New parents Lia and Chris have scored on a family home in the suburbs, a huge place with tennis courts, pool and even a Jacuzzi! Their dream will go sour if they can't sell their city home, because they'll end up on the hook for two mortgages. Real estate agent Lisa Colalillo, interior and exterior experts Jo Alcorn and Carson Arthur have only $20,000 to build out an entire basement and add the kid of curb appeal buyers call for in this downtown neighborhood. And this $20,000 must add upwards of $200,000 to the home's value!

programme.title: Critical Listing
programme.desc: Trisha and Andre finally got it right – they purchased their dream home in a family-friendly neighborhood. To seal the financial deal they must convert their current home so as to make it attractive to investors seeking out student rental housing. Real estate agent Lisa Colalillo targets their $15,000 budget to make a play on investors as buyers and increase their home's value by $75,000. Interior expert Jo Alcorn adds more bedrooms and common study areas, while landscape expert Carson Arthur turns the back yard into major chill space.

programme.desc: Georgia brings us into her garden and teaches us about small space gardening, container gardening, and how to make the most of the land around you, no matter your constraints. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to a festival in the Ozarks where she is teaching a cooking class. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Join Georgia on an urban foraging expedition and learn from an edible and medicinal plants expert as he and Georgia collect a variety of items during a walk through the neighborhood. From flower studded ice cubes, to honeysuckle tea, to dandelion green salad, Georgia is making the most of what is around her. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Irish Pub
programme.desc: The Irish Pub is a eulogy to the greatest institution in Irish society, the pub or more specifically the traditional Irish publicans who run them. The characters in this exceptionally endearing film all run and own pubs that have been in their families for generations and it is through their warmth, wit and wisdom that we gain an insight into the heart and soul of The Irish Pub.

programme.title: Blow-Ins
programme.desc: The Dingle Peninsula a rural area in the west of Ireland, with a strong Irish language culture. An island within an island. Despite this, the town boasts a foreign population of nearly 30% - the locals refer to these individuals as "blow-ins". What brought these people here? And what caused them to stay?

programme.title: Whisky
programme.desc: Documentary special about the magic of the golden liquid called whisky and the small island off the coast of Scotland which has been called "the Capital of Whisky." The Scottish island of Islay is the home of eight world famous whisky distilleries. Whisky consists mainly of peat, water, barley and most importantly, it is made by people. All of these ingredients are found on the island of Islay. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Whiskey Film
programme.desc: A visual collective of tales about those who work to define whiskey—as well as themselves—as they explore their craft. The key concept is that change occurs over time, not only in the whiskey itself but also in the lives of those who create it. Like the spirit in the distilling process, whiskey makers change under the pressures of their lives and within the context of their craft.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of Central America
programme.desc: The Taino, the first people of the Americas to greet Christopher Columbus, had an amazing multicultural society complete with drug infused rituals, strange skulls and amazing navigation.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of Central America
programme.desc: Dr. Jago explores the forgotten people of ancient Costa Rica, who built a series of spectacular settlements amongst the rivers and volcanoes of Central America.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of Central America
programme.desc: Dr. Jago Cooper explores the ancient civilization of Teotihuacan that exploded into a position of dominance in the ancient Americas almost 2000-years ago.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of South America
programme.desc: Deep in the Bolivian Andes at the breathtaking height of 13000ft stands Tiwanaku, the awe inspiring ruins of a monolithic temple city. Built by a civilisation who dominated a vast swathe of South America, it was abandoned 1000 years ago. For centuries it has been a mystery: how did a civilisation flourish at such an altitude and why did they vanish? Archaeologist Dr Jago Cooper journeys through Bolivia's spectacular landscape to investigate the origins of Tiwanaku and finds evidence of an ancient people with amazing understanding of their environment whose religion was based on collective effort and ritual beer drinking.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of South America
programme.desc: In the spectacular deserts of coastal Peru, archaeologist Dr Jago Cooper explores the dramatic rise and fall of Chimor, the first empire of South America. His journey begins among the ruins of a vast lost city once home to an all-powerful monarchy, whose subjects transformed the desert landscape, created gold and silver treasures, and believed so strongly in the power of their gods that they made the most shocking of sacrifices. Chimor thrived despite facing some of the most extreme climate conditions in the world – but not even this powerful empire could withstand the forces that eventually destroyed it.

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of South America
programme.desc: Archaeologist Dr Jago Cooper embarks on an epic journey into the remote Peruvian Andes in search of the mysterious Chachapoya people. Once numbering half a million, they were known as 'The People of the Clouds'. Dr Cooper reveals how they developed sophisticated methods of recording stories, traded in exotic goods found hundreds of miles from their territory, and had funeral traditions that challenge assumptions about ancient human behaviour. His search for evidence takes him to astonishing cliff tombs untouched for 500 years, and one of the most spectacular fortresses in South America, where the fate of the Chachapoya is revealed.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Highway To Be Anger-Prone
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: Cement Mixer
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Little Froy's Big Mistake
programme.desc: Matt and Froy take on a grungy fisherman, but when he isn't afraid to damage his own boat, Froy is the one who is sinking fast.

programme.title: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: Minutes of Fame
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount. Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the world's most bumbling guards, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner, and Lou, Froy, and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers.

programme.title: Flame-Thrown for a Loop
programme.desc: Lou struggles to pick up the pieces after the accident leaves him needing Sonia more than ever. Lou and Carlos deal with a big man in a tiny car, but when Carlos lets his guard down he's delivered some serious blows.

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: The Heartbeat Of Life
programme.desc: In the sunlit hills of Sicily, artisan Francesco transforms goatskin into tambourines, each drum a reincarnation of life's rhythm. Through his soulful craft, he gives voice to the cycle of life and death, calling his creations his children before releasing them into the world. Joined by Peppe, a passionate percussionist devoted to preserving Sicily's ancestral beat, they weave a timeless narrative of tradition, connection, and the enduring heartbeat of the drum across generations. Directed by Guisseppe Malpasso.

programme.desc: New Zealand's Pancake Rocks offer a mesmerizing combination of geology, natural beauty, and coastal splendor. The intricate rock patterns and shapes formed over millions of years of wind and water exposure will leave you awestruck.

programme.title: Spring Rites

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E1 — Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E3: Empowered Women by HUG — Dive into a world of creativity and empowerment with a vibrant showcase by talented women artists from diverse backgrounds. Each piece is a testament to the unique power of female voices, collectively weaving a dynamic narrative of inspiration.

programme.title: Pink Warriors III
programme.desc: Pink Warriors E3 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E2 — A captivating art anthology spotlighting the brilliance of women creators in a rich tapestry of creativity that transcends borders. Experience the dynamic essence of women shaping the art world with their unique voices and indomitable spirit.
